description: Add an appliance-owned Flux profile for Talos single-node deployment under `ee/appliance/flux/`.
Add appliance values overlays for the root Alga chart and each EE service chart used by the Talos profile.
Add appliance bootstrap/deploy scripts that target the Talos single-node Flux profile.
Add a Kubernetes deployment path for PgBouncer as a Helm chart under `ee/helm/pgbouncer`.
Route the root chart server deployment through PgBouncer when the appliance profile enables it.
Preserve generated root-chart DB credentials across Helm reconciliations instead of rotating them on reinstall.
Replace the current split migration/seed Helm hook flow with a single idempotent bootstrap hook job using the setup image.
Make the setup entrypoint safe to run in Kubernetes jobs that provide DB credentials via environment variables rather than Docker secret files only.
Ensure the bootstrap flow only runs seeds when the application database is still unseeded.
Wire `workflow-worker` to the appliance profile with PgBouncer-backed DB configuration and release ordering.
Wire `email-service` to the appliance profile with PgBouncer-backed DB configuration and release ordering.
Wire `temporal-worker` to the appliance profile with PgBouncer-backed DB configuration and Temporal dependency ordering.
Wire a Temporal server release into the appliance profile for single-node operation.
Document the Talos appliance GitOps deployment shape and validation expectations in repo plan/design docs.
